title: Create: Station Decor
description: This Create Addon adds New blocks to decorate train stations, it also is an extension mod for Create: Train Additions. Such as Vending Machiens, Ticket machiens and other stuff.
body: This Create Addon adds New blocks to decorate train stations, it also is an extension mod for Create: Train Additions. Such as Vending Machiens, Ticket machiens and other stuff.
